mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oauth_refresh_token (token_hash, user_id, client_id, expires_at, revoked, user_agent, ip) VALUES (#{tokenHash}, #{userId}, #{clientId}, #{expiresAt}, #{revoked}, #{userAgent}, #{ip})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oauth_refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE oauth_refresh_token SET revoked = 1, replaced_by = #{replacedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND revoked = 0
UPDATE oauth_refresh_token SET revoked = 1 WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked = 0
